proven.claim: PROVEN: Falsy Default Trap at runHook
proven.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: falsy-default
; LINE: 487
; PROVEN: Falsy Default Trap at runHook
(declare-const args_value Int)
(declare-const result Int)
; Guard: ?? used instead of || (nullish coalescing preserves falsy values)
(assert (= result args_value))
; Can result differ from input?
(assert (not (= result args_value)))
(check-sat)
; unsat → proven: falsy values preserved
